name: Leonardo, the Balance
oracle_text:
Whenever a token you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Do this only once each turn.
{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Creatures you control gain menace, trample, and lifelink until end of turn.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

name: Donatello, the Brains
oracle_text:
If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus a Mutagen token are created instead.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)
flavor_text: "I always thought there'd be more to the ooze."

name: Splinter, the Mentor
oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever Splinter or another nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)
flavor_text: "We choose what holds us back."

name: Raphael, the Muscle
oracle_text:
Double all damage that creatures you control with counters on them would deal.
When Raphael enters, create a Mutagen token.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

name: Michelangelo, the Heart
oracle_text:
Trample
Raid (the Fridge) — At the beginning of your second main phase, if you attacked this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and create a Food token.
Partner—Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

name: Heroes in a Half Shell
oracle_text:
Vigilance, menace, trample, haste
Whenever one or more Mutants, Ninjas, and/or Turtles you control deal combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures and draw a card.
flavor_text: They're the world's most fearsome fighting team!

name: Continue?
oracle_text: Choose up to four target creature cards in your graveyard that were put there from the battlefield this turn. Return them to the battlefield.
flavor_text: "You've gotta give it your all because anything less won't get the job done."

name: Endless Foot Assault
oracle_text:
Squad {1}{W} (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {1}{W} any number of times. When this enchantment enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.)
Whenever you attack, for each opponent, create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token that's tapped and attacking that player.

name: April O'Neil, Live on the Scene
oracle_text:
Whenever a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle you control enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
Partner—Character select

all_parts.name: April O'Neil, Live on the Scene

flavor_text: "This is great! I must really be onto something hot if they're trying to kill me!"

name: Baxter, Fly in the Ointment
oracle_text:
Whenever Baxter enters or attacks, each creature you control with a counter on it gains flying until end of turn.
Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on Baxter.
flavor_text: "What am I? I am nothing anymore! A FREAK! I'll never be taken seriously as a scientist again!"

name: Here Comes a New Hero!
oracle_text: Target player draws X cards. Create a token that's a copy of up to one target creature with mana value X or less.
flavor_text: "Give me a recap. Are we winning or losing?"

name: Irma, Part-Time Mutant
oracle_text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, Irma becomes a copy of up to one other target creature you control, except her name is Irma, Part-Time Mutant and she has this ability. Then put a +1/+1 counter on her.
flavor_text: "I'm not trying to cause trouble. Trouble just follows me around."

name: Krang, the All-Powerful
oracle_text:
If a player drawing a card causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Whenever a player draws their second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Krang.
flavor_text: "I am Krang, the All-Powerful! I have never been defeated!"

oracle_text:
Flying
Evolve (Whenever a creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)
Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent you attacked this turn.
Goad all creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)

({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)

({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)

name: Leo's Guidance
oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to three target creatures. Untap them.
flavor_text: Leonardo may have been a goody two-toes and the butt of every joke, but he was also the one they turned to when it was time to put the jokes away.

name: Splinter & Leo, Father & Son
type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Rat Turtle
oracle_text:
When Splinter & Leo enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player creates a 2/2 red Mutant creature token.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature target player controls.

all_parts.name: Splinter & Leo, Father & Son
all_parts.type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Rat Turtle

name: Splinter, Aging Champion
oracle_text:
When Splinter enters, destroy up to one target tapped creature.
When Splinter leaves the battlefield, you and another target player each draw a card.
flavor_text: Once every decade, Splinter returns to the Battle Nexus. He fights not for glory, but to honor an old friend.

name: Triceraton Regenta
oracle_text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Whenever this creature attacks, untap up to one other target creature.
flavor_text:
"I am meant to be the Triceraton Regenta, so I must fulfill my destiny and avenge my mother's death!"
—Seri

name: Wooden Cane
oracle_text:
When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token, then attach this Equipment to it.
Equipped creature gets +2/+1.
Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
flavor_text: "A tool need not be complex to be efficient."

name: April O'Neil, Human Element
oracle_text: Whenever a player casts an artifact, instant, or sorcery spell, you create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")
flavor_text: "If you steal mutagen that doesn't exist from aliens that also don't exist, it's not really theft. More like creative writing!"

name: Containment Protocol
oracle_text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.
flavor_text: "What else can we do? No prison could hold Tokka, and she'll hurt someone if we let her out to play."

name: Donatello, Rad Scientist
oracle_text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
When Donatello enters, tap up to three target creatures your opponents control. Put a stun counter on each of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

name: Donatello's Science Lesson
oracle_text: Tap up to two target creatures. Up to two target players each draw a card.
flavor_text: Now it is the shell who does the shocking.

name: Donnie & April, Adorkable Duo
type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Human Turtle
oracle_text:
When Donnie & April enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player draws two cards.
• Target player returns an artifact, instant, or sorcery card from their graveyard to their hand.

name: Utrom Monitor
oracle_text:
Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
flavor_text: The utrom are a peace-minded people, up to a point. Beyond that, they are a laser-minded people.

name: Casey & Raph, Hotheads
type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Human Turtle
oracle_text:
When Casey & Raph enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player exiles the top card of their library. Until that player's next end step, they may play that card without paying its mana cost.
• Target player creates two Treasure tokens.

all_parts.name: Casey & Raph, Hotheads
all_parts.type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Human Turtle

name: Casey Jones, Asphalt Hooligan
oracle_text:
Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
{4}: Double Casey Jones's power until end of turn. Any player may activate this ability.
flavor_text: "Two minutes for slashing, two minutes for hooking, and my personal favorite, two minutes for high-sticking."

name: Monster Mashup
oracle_text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
flavor_text:
"Yes! It knows how to destroy! My secret concern is, does it know how to obey?"
—Krang

name: Raphael, Tag Team Tough
oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Raphael deals combat damage to a player for the first time each turn, untap all attacking creatures. After this combat phase, there is an additional combat phase.
flavor_text: "How about a five-minute game misconduct for roughing, pal?"

name: Raph's Bravado
oracle_text: During your turn, attacking creatures get +1/+0.
flavor_text: "Why does everyone have such a hard time believing I'm a good guy?"

name: Storm of Steel
oracle_text: Storm of Steel deals 2 damage to each of one or two targets.
flavor_text: Raphael loves this stuff. There's a flash as his shuriken come out. The toughs don't even see that. Too bad.

name: Ticked Off
oracle_text: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
flavor_text:
"I can take it!"
—Raphael

name: Foe-liage
oracle_text: Whenever a land enters during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text:
"Wilcox said a weed is but an unloved flower, but this is the kind of flower only his mother could love!"
—Donatello

name: Michelangelo, On the Scene
oracle_text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
Michelangelo enters with a +1/+1 counter on him for each land you control.
When Michelangelo dies, return this card to your hand.

name: Mikey & Mona, Mutant Sitters
type_line: Legendary Creature — Mutant Ninja Turtle Lizard
oracle_text:
When Mikey & Mona enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player chooses a creature they control and puts two +1/+1 counters on it.
• Target player returns a creature or land card from their graveyard to their hand.

name: Mona Lisa, Ever Adaptable
oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a creature spell, you create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")
flavor_text: "Being surrounded by a little chaos is normally my little happy place, but . . ."

name: Prehistoric Turtlesaurus
oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
flavor_text:
"Dinobunga!"
—Michelangelo

name: Study the Classics
oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature, then double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. You gain life equal to the number of +1/+1 counters on that creature.
flavor_text:
"Well, this is *like* meditating . . ."
—Michelangelo

name: Turtle Tracks
oracle_text: Any number of target players may each search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield under their control, then shuffle.
flavor_text: A good view isn't about location. It's about perspective.

name: Manhole Cover
oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this artifact enters, target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player draws a card.

name: Dark Ritual
oracle_text: Add {B}{B}{B}.
flavor_text:
"Esposito, my liege, grant me the flavor I am due."
—Splinter, the Nibblemancer

name: Waste Not
oracle_text:
Whenever an opponent discards a creature card, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
Whenever an opponent discards a land card, add {B}{B}.
Whenever an opponent discards a noncreature, nonland card, draw a card.
flavor_text: Devoured by the turtle community.

name: Food Chain
oracle_text: Exile a creature you control: Add X mana of any one color, where X is 1 plus the exiled creature's mana value. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.
flavor_text: Every pizza is some teenager's prey.

name: Supreme Verdict
oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Destroy all creatures.
flavor_text: Raphael had no second thoughts about the supreme edict. He'd left text messages warning of the concoction, even though there was no service.

name: Commander's Plate
flavor_text: Not all edible things are fragile.

name: Sword of Hearth and Home
